prompt: A highly detailed, vibrant digital illustration in a dreamy Y2K kawaii-retro aesthetic, featuring a beautiful woman with fair skin, subtle rosy undertone, refined facial features, light blue eyes, and natural blonde hair styled in soft loose waves falling just past her shoulders. She is wearing a light blue headband, pink short-sleeve top, blue denim overalls with a small pink heart patch, and white knee-high socks with yellow stars. She is sitting cross-legged on a colorful retro bedspread, holding a bright turquoise vintage rotary telephone receiver to her ear with her right hand while her left hand rests on the phone base in front of her. The cozy bedroom background has walls completely covered with colorful 90s anime and J-pop posters, pink sheer curtains, a lava lamp, Hello Kitty plushies, books, and cute figurines on shelves. Multiple adorable chibi-style anime girl dolls (depicting the same character with blonde wavy hair, light blue eyes, light blue headband, pink top and blue overalls) are placed around her: one on her shoulder, one on her lap, one on the bed holding a camera, one drawing in a notebook, and one on the shelf. Text overlays in playful bubbly white font with sparkles: 'DREAMING...' in a thought bubble above her head, 'CALLING 90S VIBES!' with an arrow pointing to the phone, 'MY ❤️!' near one chibi, 'KAWAII!!' in multiple places, 'RETRO QUEEN' and 'COZY SPACE'. Decorative elements include floating stars, hearts, sparkles, and soft pink-cyan lighting with a warm nostalgic glow. Ultra-detailed, glossy aesthetic, perfect composition, cinematic lighting, 90s nostalgia mixed with modern kawaii style.
